mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS processId, p.tenant_id AS processTenantId, p.code AS processCode, p.currency_id AS processCurrencyId, c.code AS processCurrencyCode, p.remove_word AS processRemoveWord, p.replace_word_from AS processReplaceWordFrom, p.replace_word_to AS processReplaceWordTo, p.remark AS processRemark, p.status AS processStatus, p.created_by AS processCreatedBy, p.updated_by AS processUpdatedBy, p.created_at AS processCreatedAt, p.updated_at AS processUpdatedAt FROM process p LEFT JOIN currency c ON c.id = p.currency_id WHERE p.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY p.code ASC

SELECT d.id AS id, d.tenant_id AS tenantId, d.name AS name, d.created_at AS createdAt FROM process_description_link pdl INNER JOIN process_description d ON d.id = pdl.description_id WHERE pdl.process_id = #{value} ORDER BY d.name ASC
SELECT pd.id AS id, pd.process_id AS processId, pd.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek FROM process_day pd WHERE pd.process_id = #{value} ORDER BY pd.day_of_week ASC
SELECT id, tenant_id, code, currency_id, remove_word, replace_word_from, replace_word_to, remark, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM process WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, tenant_id, code, currency_id, remove_word, replace_word_from, replace_word_to, remark, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM process WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT id, tenant_id, code, currency_id, remove_word, replace_word_from, replace_word_to, remark, status, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM process WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND code = #{code} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO process (tenant_id, code, currency_id, remove_word, replace_word_from, replace_word_to, remark, status, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{tenantId},#{code},#{currencyId},#{removeWord}, #{replaceWordFrom},#{replaceWordTo},#{remark}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, NOW())

INSERT INTO process_description_link (process_id, description_id, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.processId}, #{item.descriptionId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE process SET currency_id = #{currencyId}, remove_word = #{removeWord}, replace_word_from = #{replaceWordFrom}, replace_word_to = #{replaceWordTo}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS id, d.tenant_id AS tenantId, d.name AS name, d.created_at AS createdAt FROM process_description d WHERE d.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY d.name ASC
SELECT d.id AS id, d.tenant_id AS tenantId, d.name AS name, d.created_at AS createdAt FROM process_description d WHERE d.name = #{name} AND d.tenant_id = #{tenantId} LIMIT 1
SELECT d.id AS id, d.tenant_id AS tenantId, d.name AS name, d.created_at AS createdAt FROM process_description d WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.tenant_id = #{tenantId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO process_description (tenant_id, name, created_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{name}, NOW())
